name: La Opala RG Limited
summary: La Opala RG Limited manufactures and markets glass and glassware products in India and internationally. Its opal glass tableware products include plates, bowls, dinner sets, cup-saucer sets, coffee mugs and cups, tea and soup sets, and pudding and dessert sets; and crystalware products comprise barware, vases, bowls, and stemware. The company offers its products under the La Opala, Diva, and Solitaire brands. La Opala RG Limited was founded in 1987 and is based in Kolkata, India.
